authRequired.title.description: Title of the auth-required prompt shown when a signed-out user tries a gated action; means 'Sign in required'.

authRequired.description.description: Body of the auth-required prompt asking the user to sign in to continue.

requestWalletConnection.defaultActionDes.description: Default value substituted into the {actionDescription} placeholder of the 'connect' description, e.g. 'to complete this action'. A short purpose clause.

requestWalletConnection.title.wrongWalle.description: Wallet-connection dialog title when the connected wallet is not the required one.

requestWalletConnection.title.settingAct.description: Wallet-connection dialog title shown while the app sets the chosen wallet as active.

requestWalletConnection.title.connect.description: Wallet-connection dialog title prompting the user to connect their wallet.

requestWalletConnection.description.wron.description: Wallet-connection dialog body when the wrong wallet is connected, asking the user to connect the correct one.

requestWalletConnection.description.sett.description: Wallet-connection dialog body shown while the active wallet is being set; asks the user to wait.

requestWalletConnection.description.conn.description: Wallet-connection dialog body prompting connection. {actionDescription} is a short purpose clause (e.g. 'to complete this action') inserted inline.

requestWalletConnection.checkingStatus.description: Status line while the dialog checks the current wallet connection status. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.settingAsActive.description: Status line while the chosen wallet is being set as active. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.requiredWallet.description: Label for the wallet address the user must connect (the required wallet).

requestWalletConnection.waitingForConnec.description: Status line while waiting for the user to complete the wallet connection. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.differentWalletC.description: Message noting the user connected a wallet other than the required one.

requestWalletConnection.youConnected.description: Label preceding the wallet address the user actually connected.

requestWalletConnection.butWeNeed.description: Label preceding the wallet address the app actually requires (contrast with what the user connected).

requestWalletConnection.connectedSuccess.description: Confirmation message that the wallet connected successfully.

requestWalletConnection.connecting.description: Busy label on the connect button while connecting. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

requestWalletConnection.next.description: Button to advance to the next step in the wallet-connection flow.

requestWalletConnection.toast.setActiveF.description: Toast error shown when setting the active wallet fails.

requestWalletConnection.toast.connectFai.description: Toast error shown when connecting the wallet fails.

requestWalletConnection.toast.unknownErr.description: Fallback toast text for an unspecified wallet error.

countryInput.placeholder.description: Placeholder for the country selector before a country is chosen; means 'Select country'.

countryInput.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the country search box. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

countryInput.noResults.description: Message shown when the country search matches no countries. Note: country names themselves are not translated here.

countryInput.clearSelection.description: Action to clear the currently selected country.

myDomains.heading.description: Page/section heading for the list of domains the signed-in user owns; means 'My Domains'.

walletNftGrid.notIndexedYet.description: Badge on an NFT card indicating the domain has not been indexed yet.

walletNftGrid.emptyIdentifier.description: Empty-state prompt asking for a wallet address or ENS name to view NFTs. Keep 'ENS' (technical term) untranslated.

walletNftGrid.invalidIdentifier.description: Error shown when the entered value is not a valid wallet address or ENS name. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.invalidIdentifierHint.description: Hint explaining valid formats: wallet must be 0x-prefixed; ENS names need a dot. Keep '0x' and 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.ensResolveFailed.description: Error shown when an ENS name could not be resolved to an address. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.ensResolveFailedHint.description: Hint suggesting the user re-check spelling or retry after an ENS resolution failure.

walletNftGrid.noWalletResolved.description: Error shown when no wallet could be resolved from the entered input.

walletNftGrid.nftCount.description: Pluralized NFT count using ICU plural. {count} is the number; keep the ICU syntax and the term 'NFT' intact.

walletNftGrid.loadDomainsFailed.description: Error shown when domains for the wallet could not be loaded.

walletNftGrid.loadDomainsFailedHint.description: Hint asking the user to refresh and try again after a load failure.

walletNftGrid.noNftsFound.description: Empty-state message: no Namefi NFTs found for this wallet. Keep 'Namefi' and 'NFT' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.noNftsFoundHint.description: Hint suggesting the user re-check the wallet/ENS name or wait for indexing to catch up.

walletNftGrid.unknownNetwork.description: Fallback label for a blockchain network whose name is unknown.

walletNftGrid.explorer.description: Short label for a block explorer link.

walletNftGrid.viewOnExplorer.description: Link/button to open the item on a block explorer (generic, no explorer named).

walletNftGrid.viewOn.description: Link/button to open the item on a specific block explorer. {explorer} is the explorer's name (e.g. 'Etherscan') — keep untranslated.

walletNftGrid.network.description: Field label for the blockchain network of an NFT.

walletNftGrid.expiration.description: Field label for a domain's expiration date.

walletNftGrid.wallet.description: Field label for a wallet address.

walletNftGrid.ens.description: Inline label showing a resolved ENS name. {name} is the ENS name — keep untranslated. Keep 'ENS' untranslated.

walletNftGrid.copiedToClipboard.description: Toast confirming a value was copied to the clipboard.

walletNftGrid.copyFailed.description: Toast title shown when copying to the clipboard fails.

walletNftGrid.copyFailedDescription.description: Toast body shown when copying fails, asking the user to try again.

instantBuyModal.title.description: Instant-buy modal title. {domain} is the domain name being purchased — keep untranslated.

instantBuyModal.description.description: Instant-buy modal subtitle stating the purchase covers 1 year of registration.

instantBuyModal.domain.description: Field label for the domain being purchased in the instant-buy modal.

instantBuyModal.pricePerYear.description: Per-year price line in the instant-buy modal. {price} is a formatted number; keep the 'USD' currency code and '/ year' unit.

instantBuyModal.selectNftWallet.description: Prompt to select which NFT wallet to use before continuing the purchase. Keep 'NFT' untranslated.

instantBuyModal.buyNow.description: Primary button to confirm the instant purchase.

instantBuyModal.errorTitle.description: Error title shown when the instant purchase fails.

instantBuyModal.errorDescription.description: Reassuring error body telling the user they were not charged and can retry.

instantBuyModal.errorDetail.description: Technical error detail line. {error} is the raw error message/code — keep untranslated.
